license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8aehsbe
title: Promega Glucose-Glo Assay
author: NUS iGEM

steps_raw.instruction: Prepare glucose detection reagent mix by adding: Luciferin Detection Solution Reductase Reductase Substrate Glucose Dehydrogenase NAD These reagents are part of a boxed set - Promega's Glucose-Glo Assay.
Dilute 2 µL overnight culture in 198 µL 1x PBS and mix
Aliquot 50 µL of each sample into three wells of 96-well plate to create triplicates
Add 50 µL of glucose detection reagent mix into each well
